abortConfirm.title: Abort Scan?
abortConfirm.description: Are you sure you want to abort the active scanning or renaming process?
abortConfirm.body: The file currently in progress will finish processing, and the operation will then halt safely.
abortConfirm.descriptionImages: Are you sure you want to abort downloading media artwork and posters?
abortConfirm.bodyImages: The current download will finish, and the image downloader will then halt safely.
abortConfirm.descriptionPeople: Are you sure you want to abort fetching details for extra people?
abortConfirm.bodyPeople: The current query will finish, and the enrichment process will then halt safely.
abortConfirm.descriptionSync: Are you sure you want to abort the active language synchronization?
abortConfirm.bodySync: The current item will finish processing, and the synchronization will then halt safely.

closePrompt.title: Close RENDA?
closePrompt.description: Choose whether to quit the application completely or minimize it to the system tray.
closePrompt.info: You can customize this behavior anytime in Settings > General.
